basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology & Science Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology & Science Pilani (BITS Pilani) Research Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website bits-pilani.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BITS Pilani Research Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Computational Partial Differential Equations (PDEs) with good publication(s)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BITS Pilani to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Research Associate position at BITS Pilani is 10-06-2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a PhD in Computational Partial Differential Equations (PDEs) along with good publications. This ensures candidates have advanced research knowledge.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for the BITS Pilani Research Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without any financial obligation for the application itself.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate position will primarily involve an online interview. This allows for a thorough assessment of the candidate's suitability and expertise.

faq.question: Q5. What is the nature of the BITS Pilani Research Associate job?
faq.answer: The Research Associate position at BITS Pilani is a contractual job. This means the employment is for a fixed term, as is common for research-oriented roles.

faq.question: Q6. Where is the BITS Pilani campus located for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by Birla Institute of Technology & Science Pilani, specifically at its Goa campus. The official website link provided is for the Goa campus.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates from any state apply for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, the recruitment is open to eligible candidates. While the campus is in Goa, there are no specific state restrictions mentioned for applicants, provided they meet the qualification criteria.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Research Associate position will be as per the ANRF Guidelines. Specific details regarding the exact salary will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Associate post at BITS Pilani. This is a single opening for qualified candidates.

faq.question: Q10. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the BITS Pilani Research Associate recruitment is strictly online. Candidates must submit their applications through the official BITS Pilani website.
